name: Western Union
description_short: Decatur, GA Western Union provides check cashing and money transfer services at Check Cashers, open 7AM-10PM weekdays and limited weekend hours.
description_long:
Western Union at Check Cashers in Decatur, GA provides convenient check cashing and money transfer services to the local community. Located at this standalone location, the branch serves Decatur residents and visitors seeking quick financial services. Hours of operation are Monday through Saturday, 7AM-10PM, with Sunday hours from 9AM-8PM.

This Decatur location offers a full range of Western Union services including check cashing, money transfers, and bill payments. Customers can reach this location at +1 404-284-7536 to inquire about specific services or current availability. The staff is experienced in handling routine transactions and can answer questions about transfer options and fees.

For Decatur residents who need quick check cashing or to send money domestically or internationally, this Western Union location provides a reliable option. Bring a valid government-issued ID and your check to ensure smooth transactions. Visit during extended weekday hours for the most convenient service.
address: Check Cashers, 2032 Candler Rd Atlanta, 2032 Candler Rd, Decatur, GA 30032

company_info.headquarters: Check Cashers, 2032 Candler Rd Atlanta, 2032 Candler Rd, Decatur, GA 30032

pros: Extensive agent network with 150+ locations across the U.S. in established retailers
24/7 online service for money transfer initiation with flexible in-store pickup
Multiple payment methods accepted including online, mobile, and in-store transactions
Real-time transfer tracking capability available to customers
Money order services available for bill payments and financial obligations
International money transfer capability for remittances and global payments
Western Union Rewards program and referral incentives for customer loyalty
cons: Service hours dependent on retail agent locations, not company-controlled—some locations close at 8:00 AM opening or 10:00 PM closing limits access
No transparent fee structure displayed on location pages; pricing must be estimated through separate tool
Technical service issues evident (Orange wallet unavailable)—reliability concerns for digital payment methods
Limited to money movement and cash services; cannot build credit or access lending products
Quality and availability varies significantly by location—some locations offer money orders only
best_for: Consumers needing convenient cash pickup from retail locations during business hours
Immigrants and expatriates sending international remittances to family abroad
Individuals making bill payments or money orders without maintaining bank accounts
Customers seeking 24/7 online money transfer initiation with same-day or next-day pickup options
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers who need convenient access to cash pickup, money transfers, or bill payments through retail locations and prefer hybrid online-plus-in-store service models. The primary caveat is that service reliability depends entirely on agent network hours and location availability, which varies significantly—some locations open as late as 8:00 AM or close as early as 10:00 PM—limiting accessibility for shift workers or those with non-traditional schedules.
services: Domestic money transfers (send and receive cash)
Mobile top-up services for prepaid phones
Western Union Prepaid card issuance and management
Delivery method updates and receiver management
meta_description: Western Union at Check Cashers, Decatur, GA. Check cashing, money transfers. Open Mon-Sat 7AM-10PM, Sun 9AM-8PM.
